case_metadata.user_request: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration for NNH on the provided surface.
case_metadata.notes: Cu3Ag NNH benchmark; dissociation observed before

plan.reasoning: History shows ontop-Cu (-1.350 eV) is current best; ontop-Ag and bridge-Cu-Cu tested with higher energies. No hollow sites explored yet. SMILES [N]=[NH] has radical on N index 0 (SP2, radical_electrons=1), so bind via ReactiveSpecies at index [0]. Select hollow site on Cu-Cu-Cu (valid per available sites list) to test a new environment. Predict MACE-MP-0 energy slightly lower than current best due to possible stabilization on alloy hollow.

History is empty so this is the first attempt. SMILES [N]=[NH] corresponds to a radical species (index 0 has radical_electrons=1). We therefore select ReactiveSpecies and bind exclusively via the radical N (index 0) at an ontop Cu site, which is a chemically reasonable starting point on the alloy surface.
